## User Story

**As a** [persona],
**I want to** [action],
**So that** [outcome].

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [result]
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [result]
- [ ] Given [edge case], when [action], then [result]
- [ ] Given [error case], when [action], then [error is handled clearly]

## Priority

- [ ] Must Have
- [ ] Should Have
- [ ] Could Have

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code implemented and reviewed
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified
- [ ] CI pipeline green
